summary: Iteration 40 - Testing new audio upload feature, PDF generator with 11 sections, and scoring function. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified. Fixed critical bug in server.py where get_stato_cliente endpoint was missing its decorator.

minor.issue: Shows 'Errore caricamento stato' when loading audio status for some clients - likely due to missing user record or auth issue

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 1950 - get_stato_cliente endpoint was missing @api_router.get decorator and async def function definition. Added: @api_router.get('/cliente-analisi/stato/{user_id}') and async def get_stato_cliente(user_id: str, credentials: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Depends(security))
Backend: calcola_scoring function works correctly - returns IDONEO (>=65%), IDONEO_CON_RISERVA (40-65%), NON_IDONEO (<40%)
Backend: genera_pdf_analisi generates valid PDF with all 11 sections (Titolo, Sintesi, Diagnosi, Punti di forza, Criticità, Livello, Conseguenze, Direzione, Intro soluzione, Esito, Prossimo passo)
Backend: POST /api/admin/cliente/{user_id}/upload-audio-analisi - Admin can upload mp3 files, requires admin role
Backend: GET /api/cliente-analisi/audio/{user_id} - Returns audio URL and availability status
Frontend: ProspectPipeline shows 3 action buttons per row (headphones, document, chevron) - VERIFIED
Frontend: AudioAnalisiModal opens when clicking headphones icon, shows upload button or audio player - VERIFIED
Frontend: Post Analisi page shows 'in preparation' message when no audio uploaded - VERIFIED
Frontend: PDF download button works in Post Analisi page - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audio upload feature is fully implemented. Admin can upload mp3 files via ProspectPipeline > headphones button > AudioAnalisiModal. Post Analisi page shows audio player when audio is available, or 'in preparation' message when not. The get_stato_cliente endpoint was fixed (was missing decorator). PDF generator creates valid PDFs with 11 sections.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/cliente/{user_id}/upload: PASSED - Admin can upload mp3 files
backend_endpoints.GET /api/cliente-analisi/audio/{user_id}: PASSED - Returns audio URL and availability
backend_endpoints.GET /api/cliente-analisi/stato/{user_id}: PASSED - Fixed missing decorator, now returns stato_cliente

backend_functions.calcola_scoring: PASSED - Returns correct classification based on quiz answers
backend_functions.genera_pdf_analisi: PASSED - Generates valid PDF with 11 sections

frontend_components.ProspectPipeline: PASSED - Shows table with 3 action buttons per row
frontend_components.AudioAnalisiModal: PASSED - Opens on headphones click, shows upload or player
frontend_components.PostAnalisiPartnership: PASSED - Shows audio section with 'in preparation' or player

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/cliente-analisi/stato/{user_id} endpoint was broken - missing @api_router.get decorator and function definition
bug_fixed.fix: Added @api_router.get('/cliente-analisi/stato/{user_id}') decorator and async def get_stato_cliente function definition
bug_fixed.verification: Endpoint now returns 200 with stato_cliente, azione_richiesta, pagina, label_admin
